{{nihongo|'''Ijimi no Wakugo'''|伊甚稚子|''ijimi no wakugo''; {{ill|dates of birth and death unknown|ja|生没年不詳}}}} was a {{ill|gōzoku|ja|豪族|lt=local chieftain}} of [[Kazusa Province]] in the [[Kofun period]]. He served as the {{ill|Ijimi no Kuni no Miyatsuko|ja|伊甚国造}}, and held the [[kabane]] of {{ill|Atai|ja|直 (姓)}}.

== Overview ==
According to the ''{{ill|Nihon Shoki|ja|日本書紀}}'' entry for the first day of the fourth month of the first year of [[Emperor Ankan]] ([[534]]), Wakugo was asked by {{ill|Kashiwade no Ōmaro|ja|膳大麻呂|lt=Kashiwade no Omi Ōmaro}}, the head of the {{ill|Naizenshi|ja|内膳司|lt=Naizen-kyō}} (Imperial Table Office), to provide pearls. Delayed in travelling up to [[Kyoto|the capital]], he failed to present the pearls by the appointed day. The angered Kashiwade no Omi Ōmaro arrested and interrogated him; terrified, Wakugo fled into the bedchamber of {{ill|Empress Kasuga|ja|春日山田皇女|lt=Empress Kasuga no Yamada no Himemiko}}. This startled the empress, and the additional charge of ''rannyū-zai'' (the crime of unlawfully entering the {{ill|kōkyū|ja|後宮|lt=inner palace}}) made the offence grave. Wakugo and his fellows begged for atonement, and it is said they offered the {{ill|Ijimi no Miyake|ja|伊甚屯倉}} (Ijimi royal storehouse estate) to Empress Kasuga.<ref>''Nihon Shoki'', vol. 18, Emperor Ankan Year 1, month 4, day 1.</ref>

It should be noted that at the time it was not unusual for the [[names]] of [[men]] to end in "-ko" (子) — examples include Nakatomi no Kamako, [[Soga no Umako]], and [[Ono no Imoko]].

== Notes ==
{{脚注ヘルプ}}
{{reflist}}

== References ==
* Kojima Noriyuki et al., ''Shinpen Nihon Koten Bungaku Zenshū (3): Nihon Shoki (2)'', Shōgakukan, 1996, ISBN 4-09-658003-1, p. 335.
* Ujitani Tsutomu (trans.), ''Nihon Shoki (jō): Zen Gendaigoyaku'' (Kōdansha Gakujutsu Bunko), Kōdansha, 1988, ISBN 4-06-158833-8, p. 370.

== See also ==
* {{ill|List of people before the Asuka period|ja|飛鳥時代以前の人物一覧}}

{{デフォルトソート:いしみ の わくこ}}
[[Category:古墳時代の人物]]
[[Category:古代日本の人物]]
[[Category:上総国の人物]]
[[Category:千葉県の歴史]]
[[Category:生没年不詳]]
[[Category:Kuni no miyatsuko]]
[[ja:伊甚稚子]]
